problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Liquid crystal elastomer actuation — specifically Liquid crystal elastomer — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
